variables.diff_failure_message: No Luther workflow source/config/test diff found and no reusable open PR exists
variables.plan_static_content:
# Implementation Plan

1. Read {artifact_dir}/issue.md and confirm the requested behavior for Luther issue #{issue_number}: runtime target selection must not require editing checked-in workflow templates.
2. Inspect workflow/src/cli/mod.rs, workflow/src/main.rs, workflow/src/workflow/, workflow/config/, and workflow/tests/e2e_workflow_integration.rs.
3. Implement the smallest source/config change so CLI target overrides can set repo, issue, work_dir, and artifact_dir, and unresolved target/path variables fail before execution.
4. Add or update focused tests and fixtures covering llxprt-code and llxprt-luther target profiles.
5. Run targeted verification for the changed workflow files only, then keep the final diff narrowly scoped to issue #{issue_number}.
